_comment: Container gateway config. Brain = Nemotron NVFP4 served by vLLM over its OpenAI API (http://vllm:8000/v1). NOTE: voice (talk/tts) is handled by ui/bridge.mjs, NOT by the gateway, so the gateway needs no ElevenLabs key and stays internal-only. VERIFY the provider key names against `openclaw models list` on the box.
